description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with highly distorted and fragmented geometry, making it difficult to discern clear anatomical features. The figure appears to be wearing a brimmed hat and a collared shirt, with some suggestion of long pants and shoes. The limbs and torso are stretched and warped, with the legs and arms appearing elongated and twisted in unnatural directions. The surface texture is irregular, with patches of smooth and rough areas, and the overall form is abstracted, lacking clear definition of hands, feet, or facial features. The color palette is dominated by dark browns, blacks, and muted flesh tones, with some lighter highlights. The object gives the impression of a glitched or corrupted digital scan of a person in urban attire.
description: A distorted adult pedestrian figure with a brimmed hat, collared shirt, and long pants, featuring warped limbs and an abstract, fragmented form in dark tones.
description_view_0: This view shows the brimmed hat and upper torso, with the left arm and leg appearing especially elongated and twisted.
description_view_1: The side profile emphasizes the warped geometry of the torso and the extreme stretching of the limbs, with little detail visible in the face.
description_view_2: The lower body and legs are most visible here, showing the unnatural bending and elongation of the legs and feet.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the back and side of the figure, with the hat and upper body more prominent, and the right leg bent at an odd angle.
attribute_clothing_type: collared shirt, long pants, brimmed hat
